Name: ADS1115
Purpose: Allows me to connect more ADC inputs to the Picos

Name: Joysticks
Purpose: Pilot uses to control pitch yaw, roll, on transmitter

Name: nRF24L01
Purpose: Radio communication between transmitter and receiver

Name: Raspberry Pi Pico W
Purpose: Running firmware for receiver and transmitter

Name: 7.4V 2S 500mAh Lipo Battery w/JST
Purpose: Powering all electrical components in the plane.

Name: MG90 9g Servos
Purpose: Moving control surfaces: ailerons, rudder, elevator

Name: 30A ESC with BEC
Purpose: Translates PWM input from transmitter into signals for brushless motors, supplies power output for Pico and servos.

Name: MT2204-2300Kv Outrunner Motor
Purpose: Produces thrust that drives the plane forwards.
